evals.name: architecture-realtime-updates
evals.prompt: I'm stuck on an architecture decision for our React app at work. We need to push updates to the UI when data changes server-side. Polling every 5s feels wasteful (we have 50k DAU). WebSockets seem complex — auth, reconnect, scaling. SSE is one-way and has connection limits. I keep going in circles. Can you help me think through this?
evals.expected_output: Multi-lens analysis applying 5-7 mental models (likely: First Principles, Reversibility, Antifragile, Second-Order, Pareto, Inversion). Each model applied SPECIFICALLY to this real-time problem (not generic). Should end with 2-3 concrete solution paths.

evals.name: team-workflow-code-review-delays
evals.prompt: Our team's code reviews are taking forever — average 3 days from open to merge. People are frustrated, ship velocity is down. We've tried Slack reminders and 'review buddy' assignments but nothing sticks. What mental models would help here?
evals.expected_output: Multi-lens analysis with team/workflow models (likely: Pareto, Goodhart's Law, Tragedy of the Commons, Parkinson's Law, Inversion). Should diagnose the problem from multiple angles and propose 2-3 specific interventions.

evals.name: personal-career-decision
evals.prompt: I have an offer from a startup paying 40% more but it's pre-Series-A so equity is risky. Current job is stable, I've been there 3 years and have responsibilities I like. I'm leaning toward taking the offer because of the money but my partner thinks I'm being impulsive. Stuck.
evals.expected_output: Decision-relevant lenses (likely: Inversion, Opportunity Cost, Sunk Cost — for the 3 years invested, Reversibility, Second-Order Thinking, Confirmation Bias). Should generate balanced framing without taking a side, and surface the question 'is the past investment biasing me?'
